# HousePath

> HousePath is your complete UK mortgage toolkit — an iOS app by 1707 Ltd that helps you browse mortgage rates, check affordability, calculate stamp duty, and plan the full cost of moving home in the UK.

## Pages

- [Home](https://housepath.co.uk/): Landing page introducing HousePath and its tools (rate browser, affordability calculator, stamp duty calculator, move budget planner), with a link to download on the App Store.
- [Privacy Policy](https://housepath.co.uk/privacy/): How HousePath handles data — what is and isn't collected, third-party services (Google AdMob, Apple StoreKit), data storage and retention, GDPR rights, and contact details.

## Contact

- Email: rory@1707.co.uk
- Publisher: 1707 Ltd
